properties.name: jwt.secret-key
properties.description: Secret key used for signing JWT tokens.

properties.name: jwt.expiration-time
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: notification.cleanup.retention-days
properties.description: Number of days to retain expired notifications before permanent deletion.

properties.name: drive.paths.my-drive
properties.description: Filesystem path for user My Drive storage.

properties.name: drive.paths.shared-drive
properties.description: Filesystem path for shared drive storage.

properties.name: drive.paths.admin-drive
properties.description: Filesystem path for admin drive storage.

properties.name: drive.paths.media-cache
properties.description: Filesystem path for media cache drive storage.

properties.name: drive.paths.plex-upload
properties.description: Filesystem path for Plex upload directory.

properties.name: drive.cache.ttl
properties.description: Time-to-live for cached drive contents before staleness.

properties.name: drive.cache.ttl-millis
properties.description: Cache TTL in milliseconds for the warm-up scheduler refresh interval.
